name: prettier
purpose: Code formatter for repository source, configuration, documentation, and JSON/YAML files.
licenseEvidence: npm registry metadata from `npm view prettier version license repository.url --json` reported license `MIT` and repository `git+https://github.com/prettier/prettier.git`.
wellKnownEvidence: Prettier is a widely used code formatter for JavaScript, TypeScript, JSON, YAML, Markdown, and web projects.
